character.name:
Shadow golem familiar, isometric pixel art, gothic fantasy. Hulking 
stone construct, wide blocky torso, pillar legs, massive arms, cube-like 
head. Dark stone grey #1a1a2e with glowing cyan rune carvings #00ccff 
on chest and forehead. Eyes are glowing cyan slits. Slow, tank-like. 
Crisp pixel art, transparent background.
